not_found_text: This share does not exist or has expired.
setup_desc: Welcome! Please fill in the details to configure EasyShare.
setup_data_dir_help: Absolute server path where shared files will be stored. E.g.: /var/www/mysite/data
setup_base_url_help: Full URL without trailing slash. E.g.: https://files.example.com
setup_api_key_help: Secret key for upload authentication. Generate a strong random string.
setup_share_code_length_help: Number of characters in the share URL identifier. Must be the same across all clients.
setup_client_config_desc: Download configuration for Windows and Android apps.
setup_client_config_help: Import the file into EasyShare ('import' command) or Android app (Settings → Import).
setup_error_write: Cannot write configuration file. Check permissions.
setup_error_dir: Data directory does not exist or is not writable.
